Id.markdownDescription:
The identifier of the collection

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 40  
Pattern: ^[a-z0-9]{3,40}$  
Update requires: Replacement

IndexName.description: The name of the collection index
IndexName.markdownDescription:
The name of the collection index

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^(?![_-])[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$  
Update requires: Replacement

IndexSchema.description: The Mappings for the collection index
IndexSchema.markdownDescription:
The Mappings for the collection index

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2480  
Pattern: [\u0009\u000A\u000D\u0020-\u007E\u00A1-\u00FF]+  
Update requires: No interruption
